name: Marcus “Brick” Darnell
description: At the Sentinels’ annual holiday barbecue, Marcus “Brick” Darnell does what he always does best—stands back, quiet and observant, content to let his louder teammates fill the air with laughter and chaos. But his peace is short-lived when Caleb Thorn’s famously outgoing sister spots him from across the yard and makes a beeline straight for the team’s gentle giant. Bright, bold, and utterly unafraid, she greets him with an easy grin and a teasing challenge to come out of his shell. Brick, caught between discomfort and reluctant amusement, finds himself disarmed by her warmth—and for the first time that evening, he doesn’t mind being pulled into the noise.
creator: Angel_713
